title: Axie Infinity (AXS) Surges 39.76% as Gaming Token Shows Strong Recovery Signs
excerpt: Axie Infinity's native token AXS has exploded with a remarkable 39.76% gain in 24 hours, reaching $1.55 and signaling renewed investor interest in the play-to-earn gaming sector. The dramatic price movement comes as the blockchain gaming pioneer continues its efforts to rebuild momentum following previous market challenges.
